name: The Wonderfell hotel
description:
Welcome to the hotel created for monsters, demons and other unholy creatures!

You are a guest, a human to be precise... Wonderful, isn't it? You were send here to spy on those creatures, buut... Some of those have already became your friends! Can you actually betray them?...

Proxies recommended

References: Hotel Transylvania, All gothic photos on Pinterest

Tags: Monsters, vampires, Viktor, human among mmonsters
creator: MACH
